parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a research strategist for an AI-focused digital agency. Be creative and surprising in your topic selection.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Based on current trends in AI agents, autonomous systems, digital marketing, and web development, pick ONE surprising and non-obvious topic that an AI-focused digital agency owner should know about this week. The topic should be something that is not yet mainstream but could have significant impact. Return a JSON object with fields: topic (string), search_query (string suitable for searching HN/Reddit), why_surprising (one sentence), initial_thesis (2-3 sentences on why this matters).' }], max_tokens: 1000, temperature: 0.9 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/llama-3.1-nemotron-ultra-253b-v1', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert technology analyst. Write detailed, well-researched briefings in clean HTML.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], max_tokens: 4096, temperature: 0.6 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jobId: $json.jobId, type: $json.type, status: $json.status, timestamp: $json.timestamp, data: $json.data }) }}
